center.id: loc-洛马林达-加利福尼亚州-17b285c6
center.name: 洛马林达 (加利福尼亚州)
center.summary: 洛马林达 (加利福尼亚州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括雙黃頭亞馬遜鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Introduced populations can be found in Stuttgart, Germany, where a recent population of over 50 individuals resides. Smaller introduced populations are to be found in coastal neighborhoods of San Diego, California, including Coronado, Ocean Beach, Pacific Beach, Point Loma, La Jolla, and Imperial Beach; they are also found in Santa Ana, Loma Linda and Pasadena, all also in Southern California
